name: Classroom Whispers
short_description: Classroom Whispers immerses you in the eerie hallways of an Argentine school during the night shift, where nothing is as it seems.
detailed_description:
Story: Classroom Whispers immerses you in the dark hallways of an Argentine school during the night shift, where nothing is as it seems. You take on the role of a janitor who, in the midst of his solitary routine, begins to experience strange events: children appearing in empty classrooms, shadows watching you from the corners, and a growing sense that something is terribly wrong.

What starts as just another night quickly turns into a nightmare with no escape. When you try to leave the building, you find yourself trapped. The whispers that once seemed distant now surround you, and you must face your fears to find a way out of the school… or be trapped forever.

Gameplay: Classroom Whispers is a first-person game where you must complete your duties as a school janitor until your shift ends. As things start to get strange, you’ll have to find ways to escape the school by solving puzzles, collecting important items, and uncovering the story behind these strange apparitions.

Characters: In this game, you will encounter children who will guide you through the school's facilities, helping you to free yourself from the demonic presence.

Mechanics: During your encounters with the demonic presence, you can hide in dark places to stay out of its sight, but your character has a sanity meter that will decrease the longer you stay in those spots or in tense situations.

supported_languages:
English, Spanish - Latin America*
*languages with full audio support
